title: H_001 Flat-band quantum geometry → ambient (293 K @ 1 atm) superconductor. Tests whether a high-Chern flat band with large ∫tr g enters the room-T two-lever design box. REFUTED.
verdict: 🔴 CLOSED-NEGATIVE — 0/2 real hosts (CoSn g2.87, Nb3Cl8 g2.11) enter the box; geometry passes but Ω~15-30 meV misses the 130 meV gate (Fubini-Study two-lever wall). bkt_Tc max ~10 K vs 293 K target. Consistent with full 10-path closure.

title: H_002 A light-element superhydride is dynamically stable AND superconducting at 293 K @ 1 atm. Tests vc-relax convergence + all-real phonons + Tc≥273 K at ambient pressure. INCONCLUSIVE.
verdict: 🟠 INCONCLUSIVE — Li2CuH6/Mg2IrH6 ambient-dynamically-unstable; AcBeH8 / B-C clathrates vc-relax non-converged (pods down, deferred per d_defer_no_delete). No ambient-stable candidate reached the Tc gate.

title: H_006 Is the FS two-lever geometry lever (∫tr g) dimension-invariant? Promotes brainstorm seed F2 to a frozen card. Toy probe: REFUTED (extensive).
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → DIMENSION-EXTENSIVE (toy) + REAL-3D done (src/fbgeom_3d.py): 3D Tc lever L_3D=1.84x (BKT-vortex 1.50 x coordination 1.22) is REAL but PARTIAL — closes only ~21% of the ~5x room-T gap; native 3D flat bands (pyrochlore/hyperkagome/3D-Lieb) are GAPLESS band-touchings -> geometry contaminated, clean dimension-FRAME bypass BLOCKED. 3D is an additive lever (stacked in H_007), not a wall-removal.

title: H_003 The +@ combination (bilayer division-of-labor, M1 SPLIT) enters the room-T two-lever box no single host can — geometry in layer A, stiff glue proximity-imported from layer B.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → BOX-OPENS-AT-IDEAL-INTERFACE — +@ bilayer enters the box (eta*=0.73, omega_eff=130meV, g_eff=2.87) the single CoSn host cannot, but only via a phonon-transparent/electron-opaque interface (critical electron_cost=0.415) and only to bkt_Tc~59K (box cleared, room-T not). 6/6 falsifiers PASS. SPLIT relocates the wall into an interface criterion, does not remove it.

title: H_004 The +@ box reaches room-T only with an electronic (eV-class) glue — a phonon glue tops out ~91 K (M3 BORROW).
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → PHONON-GLUE-INSUFFICIENT — room-T via the +@ box needs Omega~643meV, above the phonon ceiling (200meV -> tc_max~91K); only an electronic eV-class reservoir (exciton/plasmon/magnon) can supply it, relocating the wall to 'pair without a competing instability'. 5/5 falsifiers PASS.

title: H_005 The +@ combination stack (geometry-import x electronic glue x ideal interface) reaches the 293 K box in the toy band — each lever necessary, breakthrough conditional on 2 stacked unsolved sub-problems.
verdict: 🟢 MODEL-PROBE → ROOM-T REACHABLE IN TOY BAND — full stack: g_eff=2.87, omega_eff=700meV -> bkt_Tc~319K (room-T CLEARED); ablate glue->91K FAILS, ablate geometry->box closes, ablate interface->box closes (each lever necessary). 5/5 falsifiers PASS. Breakthrough is a FACTORIZATION: room-T wall -> (a) electron-opaque interface + (b) competing-order-free electronic glue. Real verdict needs DFT heterostructure (src/+pod).

title: H_007 A 3-lever stack (geometry x electronic glue x real 3D lever) reaches room-T by RELAXING each lever's demand 1.84x — 3-combination beats 2-combination, each lever necessary.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → 3-LEVER RELAXES DEMAND — adding the real 3D lever (L_3D=1.84x) drops the room-T glue requirement 642.7->349.3 meV; Tc by order 10->159->293K (1<2<3 monotone), each lever necessary (ablate 3D->159K, ablate glue->168K). 5/5 PASS. Win is conditional on the levers being independent in a real 3D heterostructure (L2). Room-T at a knife-edge.

title: H_008 The retarded explicit-phonon vertex makes pair-channel <g>_pair EXCEED the single-particle Peotta-Torma value (4.27x) in the anti-adiabatic weak-coupling corner — real sign-free ED reopens the glue crack the static mean-field closed.
verdict: 🟢 REAL-ED → RETARDED VERTEX EXCEEDS STATIC BOUND — sign-free 2e+phonon ED (pool host summer, dim up to 562500): best <g>_pair=0.822 vs single-particle 0.192 (ratio 4.27x) at Omega=8/g=0.6; static-U baseline stays BELOW sp (crack was closed by mean-field, reopened by retarded vertex). Excess is corner-specific (anti-adiabatic Omega>>g); strong-coupling ratio collapses to 0.08-0.78. Glue lever (H_004) is real but corner-confined.

title: H_009 The third material is the connector — a wide-gap/phonon-matched spacer C (hBN-class) opens a fabricable thickness window that is both electron-opaque and phonon-transparent, promoting H_003's interface knob to a real material lever.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → CONNECTOR-WINDOW-EXISTS — a wide-gap/phonon-matched spacer (lambda_e=0.5, lambda_ph=5.0 ML) has a fabricable window [0.44, 1.78] ML (width 1.34) that is both electron-opaque (cost<=0.415) AND phonon-transparent (T>=0.70); a non-selective spacer (lambda_e=lambda_ph) has NO window. 4/4 PASS. hBN-class is the candidate. Risk: an electronic glue may not pass an electron-opaque spacer (L2).

title: H_010 TOP-DOWN lever-count scan — more levers means ACHIEVABILITY, not redundancy; 4 is the minimal achievable count (3D crosses the achievable-glue line, connector is structural).
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → MORE LEVERS = ACHIEVABILITY — stripping the full {geo,connector,glue,3D} stack: full-4 glue demand 349meV achievable (sub-eV), drop-3D 643meV UNachievable (3D crosses the line), drop-connector inf/wall (structural). Minimal achievable count = 4; no lever removable. 4/4 PASS. Inverts 'fewer is better': count distributes the ~5x deficit so each lever's demand becomes material-achievable.

title: H_011 The +@ trilayer is self-consistent ONLY for a bosonic (field-coupled) glue — a neutral exciton/plasmon penetrates the electron-opaque connector via its long-range Coulomb field, a fermionic electron-transfer glue is blocked.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → NO CONTRADICTION (conditional on a bosonic glue) — bosonic field-coupled glue (lambda_coulomb=8 >> lambda_e=0.5 ML) opens a window [0.44, 2.85] ML through the electron-opaque spacer (Coulomb penetrates, Forster/Coulomb-drag-like); fermionic transfer glue BLOCKED (no window). 4/4 PASS. Resolves H_009 L2: the whole +@ chain collapses to one requirement — a bosonic, field-coupled, ~349 meV glue without competing order.

title: H_012 A topology/symmetry-protected pairing gap is NOT an orthogonal 5th room-T lever — it buys only pairing amplitude, the room-T stack is phase-stiffness-limited, so it collapses into the H_001 geometry lever.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → CLOSED-NEGATIVE (collapse) — topology is a pairing-AMPLITUDE lever; the room-T 4-lever stack is phase-STIFFNESS-limited (BKT band), so a protected gap never relaxes the 349 meV glue demand (even 2000 meV relaxes nothing) and the only stiffness it adds = FS quantum metric = H_001 geometry lever. NOT an orthogonal 5th axis (unlike the real 1.84x 3D lever). 4/5 (F1 FAIL = the intended does-not-relax). fleet lane.

title: H_013 Charge/spin/orbital fractionalization evades the FS two-lever tie at the SECTOR level (geometry in spinon, glue in holon) — but only above an exotic ~800 meV fractionalization gap and only to ~77 K.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → BOX-OPENS-BUT-NEW-BILL — sector-split genuinely evades the single-electron FS tie (a real orthogonal bypass) but the box opens only above Delta_frac~800 meV (critical 459 meV vs recombination) and reaches only ~77 K; the wall is relocated to an exotic deconfinement gap, not removed. 6/6. fleet lane.

title: H_014 The room-T electronic glue drives a competing order (SDW) BEFORE superconductivity — under a toy Stoner/RPA model the +@ architecture fails the competing-order gate (SDW U*=1.0 < SC U*=2.22, no SC-leading window).
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → CLOSED-NEGATIVE — toy Stoner/RPA multi-channel: SDW unstable at U*=1.0, SC at U*=2.22 -> SDW diverges FIRST, no SC-leading window; room-T glue (U~0.5-1.0) at/below SDW threshold. The dominant assumed risk is realized: glue drives SDW before SC. 0/5 (all triggered). CONDITIONAL on toy constants (nesting 0.85) -> a measured THREAT escapable by suppressing nesting (L1/L2), not a terminal ceiling. fleet lane.

title: H_016 Frustrating the nesting (eta_nest sweep) lifts H_014's competing-order wall — below eta*~0.45 (plausible for kagome/triangular) SC becomes the leading instability; room-T amplitude axis stays uncleared.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → HONEST-POSITIVE — break-walls continuation of H_014: sweeping frustration eta_nest 0.85->0.10 flips SDW-vs-SC at critical eta*=0.45 (closed-form f_glue/N; grid 0.44), ABOVE the pre-registered plausibility floor 0.30 -> competing order is a REMOVABLE wall (frustrate the host), not robust. 5/5 PASS, deterministic. BUT room-T amplitude uncleared (relaxed room-T U=0.543 < SC threshold 2.22) -> escape buys SC-leading, not room-T magnitude. absorbed=false, GATE_OPEN.

title: H_017 Disorder does NOT give the geometry lever for free — the same disorder that flattens the band to >=2x DOS Anderson-localizes carriers below the Cooper-pair length; flat-and-delocalized window empty.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → CLOSED-NEGATIVE — seed O2 (obstacle-as-resource): flat-enough onset needs W_dis>=1.0 (2x DOS) but delocalization fails already at W_dis>0.67, so at the flat onset xi_loc=0.55*xi_0 (localized). flat-AND-delocalized window empty (0/5). Disorder-flatness and pair delocalization mutually exclusive under 2D weak-localization. Escape (untested): 3D mobility edge / BEC-side short pair.

title: H_018 Adversarial held-out check of the central Tc estimator — gets the AVERAGE right (geomean 1.86x) but FAILS per-material SCATTER (1061x spread on 8 held-out anchors); individual Tc / room-T extrapolations carry order-of-magnitude uncertainty.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → CLOSED-NEGATIVE — geometric_bkt_tc_band (Tc=0.456*Omega) vs 8 held-out real SCs (tTLG, RTG, CsV3Sb5, MgB2, Pb, YBCO...): geomean 1.86x, bias +0.27dex, 50% within 3x, monotonic (4/5 PASS) BUT F4 scatter FAIL (spread 1061x vs 6.8x in-sample). Fair order-of-magnitude average, NOT a reliable per-material predictor -> room-T Tc numbers carry ~order-of-magnitude uncertainty (read as coordinates). Does NOT affect the wall/closed-negative findings (gates/races, not absolute Tc).

tier: 🟢 REAL-DFT → ELECTRON-OPACITY CONFIRMED (achievable half of the +@ verdict)
title: H_015 Real PBE+D3 DFT (self-built QE 7.2, summer) on graphene/hBN(n)/graphene shows the hBN spacer suppresses interlayer electronic coupling — graphene Dirac-point residual DOS drops 7.7x from direct contact (n=0) to one hBN layer then plateaus, and spacer-interior DOS at E_F decays monotonically with n — confirming the +@ electron-opacity half ONLY (glue-transparent/bosonic cRPA half deferred).
verdict: 🟢 REAL-DFT — graphene/hBN(n)/graphene n=0..3, all SCF converged (PBE, Grimme-D3, 50/400 Ry, 12x12x1, kjpaw_psl PAW). Graphene Dirac-point residual interlayer pz DOS: n0=0.0472 -> n1=0.0061 (7.7x drop) -> n2/n3=0.0053 (plateau at isolated-graphene floor). hBN-interior pz DOS at E_F/atom: n1=0.00249 -> n2=0.00160 -> n3=0.00108 (monotone decay). Layers charge-symmetric (|imbalance|=0.0000 e). 4/4. SCOPE: PBE electron-opacity ONLY, not the cRPA bosonic-glue cross-coupling (L1); graphene proxy + 1.75% lattice mismatch + finite unrelaxed cell. Host apt pw.x 6.7 aborts (fortify buffer-overflow) -> built QE 7.2 from source. absorbed=false.

title: H_020 Named-trio room-T amplitude — CoSn/hBN/Ta2NiSe5 with Ta2NiSe5's verified ~300meV glue is a HIGH-Tc coordinate (~252K w/ 3D lever) but NOT room-T, ~41K/~49meV short.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → CLOSED-NEGATIVE — named trio with verified ~300meV glue: bkt_Tc 2D=137K, +3D lever=252K (clears 133K ambient ceiling, MISSES 293K); room-T needs Omega=349meV -> 49meV/41K short. F1(room-T) correctly TRIGGERED, 4/5 PASS. Real named box-clearing stack = HIGH-Tc coordinate, NOT RTSC. absorbed=false. Gap = a higher-energy clean glue.

title: H_021 A×B pair leaderboard over the candidate registry — CoSn/hBN/Ta2NiSe5 tops it (only fully-verified box-clearing pair, ~252K coordinate); higher-Tc pairs gap-blocked.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → CREDIBLE-PARTIAL — leaderboard of all A×B registry pairs (verified values only): CoSn/hBN/Ta2NiSe5 leads (in_box, bkt_Tc_3D=251.6K coordinate). Higher pairs gap-blocked: CoSn/1T-TiSe2 would clear room-T (~400meV mode) but boson_meV unregistered + CDW competing-order gap. 5/5 PASS. Makes 🟠->🟢 path concrete. absorbed=false.

title: H_022 Frustration-unlock confluence — IF 1T-TiSe2 CDW suppressed (H_016) AND ~400meV exciton survives, CoSn/hBN/1T-TiSe2 clears room-T (335.5K) AND SC-leading; but research showed the coexistence does NOT hold in 1T-TiSe2.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → 🟠 CONDITIONAL — confluence: both model blockers pass on 1T-TiSe2 (stacked_tc(400,3D)=335.5K room-T cleared +50.7meV margin; SC leads CDW at frustrated eta=0.35, U_sc2.22<U_cdw7.14; commensurate control SDW-leads). is_green=False (honesty gate). Research lanes then CLOSED the coexistence: the 400meV exciton IS the excitonic-CDW (Cu/pressure/strain kill the exciton when suppressing the CDW). 6/6 PASS. Sharp NEGATIVE hand-off, not 🟢. absorbed=false.
